name: tinyfish-fetch
description: Fetch one or more URLs via the TinyFish Fetch API and get clean markdown, HTML, or screenshots back, with JS rendering and optional geo-targeted proxying.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch one or more URLs via the TinyFish Fetch API and get clean markdown, HTML, or screenshots back, with JS rendering and optional geo-targeted proxying.
interface.longDescription: Verify TINYFISH_API_KEY is set, then POST target URLs to the Fetch API and read rendered content from results[].content.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use TinyFish Fetch safely.
